helpers.purpose: Returns non-cancelled attendance records for a session.
Returns attendance rate = (present + late) / expected for athlete in the season. 0.0 when no expected sessions.
Returns count of unexcused absences with counted_toward_freeze=true in the rolling window.
Runs the PolicyResolver nearest-match cascade for a session.
Computes status ('present' | 'late') from session.starts_at + checked_in_at + policy.grace_period_minutes.
Returns the array of athlete IDs expected at the session (from active AthleteEnrollment on the team+season).
True when the athlete's unexcused-absence count in policy.absence_freeze_period_days window >= policy.max_unexcused_absences_per_period.
True when the athlete's active Membership has at least one unconsumed Pass in the current period whose valid_from..valid_until brackets session.starts_at.
